closure_note: V1.32 Preset Quality Gate iteration closed. 4 plans shipped. QC tri-review approved (P1: 3 rounds, P2: 2 rounds, P3: 2 rounds, P4: 2 rounds). 1 security residual closed (SEC-V131-01). 2 new open residuals registered (R-P2-01 Medium, R-P2-02 Low — capability schema gap out of P2 scope). Deferred OUT items (DF-29, DF-31, DF-42, DF-44, PD-05) remain open in active tracker. Platform pause preserved.

findings.title: judge.llm and context.summarize still read raw creator_id/session_id — same IDOR pattern as fixed acp_prompt
findings.original_source: pr-review O-1 (security follow-up to cursor review)
findings.closure_note: P3 plan. Both capabilities now read only context-injected _creator_id/_session_id. Orchestration engine task boundary (StateCompositeTask::run) injects trusted context at invocation. 6 regression tests prove spoofing impossible. Defense-in-depth restored. No behavior change for legitimate (context-injected) callers.
